Class DashboardModel

java.lang.Object
Models.DashboardModel
public class DashboardModel extends Object
Immutable model representing the data displayed on the Dashboard screen.

Encapsulates budget summary information including the total allowance, cycle spending, daily spending, category breakdowns, and the current budget status. Used by DashboardActivity to update the UI.

  • Field Details

    • totalAllowance

      private final double totalAllowance

    • totalSpentCycle

      private final double totalSpentCycle

    • dailySpent

      private final double dailySpent

    • safeDailyLimit

      private final double safeDailyLimit

    • categoryTotals

      private final Map<String,Double> categoryTotals

    • statusColorKey

      private final String statusColorKey

  • Constructor Details

    • DashboardModel

      public DashboardModel(double totalAllowance, double totalSpentCycle, double dailySpent, double safeDailyLimit, Map<String,Double> categoryTotals, String statusColorKey)
      Constructs a DashboardModel with all required dashboard data.
      Parameters:
      totalAllowance - the total budget allowance for the current cycle
      totalSpentCycle - the total amount spent during the entire cycle
      dailySpent - the amount spent today only
      safeDailyLimit - the recommended daily spending limit
      categoryTotals - a map of category names to their total spending amounts
      statusColorKey - a string key indicating budget status: "green", "orange", or "red"

  • Method Details

    • getTotalAllowance

      public double getTotalAllowance()
      Returns the total budget allowance for the current cycle.
      Returns:
      the total allowance amount

    • getDailySpent

      public double getDailySpent()
      Returns the amount spent today only (not the full cycle).
      Returns:
      today's spending amount

    • getSafeDailyLimit

      public double getSafeDailyLimit()
      Returns the recommended safe daily spending limit.
      Returns:
      the daily limit amount

    • getRemainingBudget

      public double getRemainingBudget()
      Returns the remaining budget for the current cycle.

      Calculated as total allowance minus total spent in the cycle.

      Returns:
      the remaining budget amount

    • getStatusMessage

      public String getStatusMessage()
      Returns a human-readable status message based on the current budget status.
      Returns:
      a status message string (e.g., warning or on-track message)

    • getStatusColor

      public Color getStatusColor()
      Returns the color associated with the current budget status.
      Returns:
      Color.RED if exceeded, Color.ORANGE if near limit, or green if on track

    • getSpendingPercentage

      public double getSpendingPercentage()
      Calculates the percentage of the total allowance that has been spent in the cycle.
      Returns:
      the spending percentage (0–100), or 0 if allowance is not set
